introSection: Grand Prix is a travelling steel roller coaster operated by Helm and Sons Amusements.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Grand Prix was previously operated by Brass Ring Amusements. Where the ride operated prior is not known. It was acquired by Davis Amusement Cascadia in 2013, then Helm and Sons Amusements in 2020.

fullText:
Grand Prix is a travelling steel roller coaster operated by Helm and Sons Amusements.

Grand Prix was previously operated by Brass Ring Amusements. Where the ride operated prior is not known. It was acquired by Davis Amusement Cascadia in 2013, then Helm and Sons Amusements in 2020.

Black track and White supports.
